Header.title: img/studio/logo-small-shadow.png
Header.paragraph: Thinking about getting a tattoo in Stockholm? We can help you!

About.paragraph:
We offer a variety of styles like geometric, dot work, realism black and gray, traditional american, neo traditional, illustration, thicker & thin lines. Small, medium or Big Tattoos.
Book your tattoo with us!
Our studio has new address, we moved from Frejgatan 58, Odenplan Vasastan, where we have been for 7 years - now you find us at: Mariatorget
You will find a nice atmosphere and can book your tattoo with Patricia Gea tattoo artist with 17 years tattooing experience.
You can book your tattoo ONLINE (at least 1 day in advance)
For DROP IN - WALK IN to get tattoo at same day or next day send a TXT MSG to patricia.gea@gmail.com and wait for the confirmation

Services.name: Custom Design
Services.text: Bring your idea and references. We create a custom design adapted to your style and skin area.

Services.name: Geometric and Ornamental
Services.text: Detailed geometric and ornamental work with precise line flow and strong visual composition.

Services.name: Realism Black and Gray
Services.text: Realism focused pieces with clean shading, contrast, and long-term readability.

Services.name: Traditional and Neo Traditional
Services.text: Classic and modern tattoo approaches with bold structure and personal character.

Services.name: Online Booking
Services.text: Book online in advance and share your concept to speed up consultation and planning.

Services.name: Drop-In Support
Services.text: For same-day and next-day options, contact the studio first to confirm artist availability.

Testimonials.text: "Friendly team and clear guidance from the first message to the final result."

Contact.address: Brännkyrkagatan 48, Södermalm Stockholm ( central area - Mariatorget subway station)

Features.title: Central Location
Features.text: Studio located at Mariatorget, central Stockholm, easily accessible by public transport and close to popular areas.

Features.title: Experienced Artists
Features.text: A team specialized in multiple tattoo styles with years of practical studio experience.

Features.title: Simple Booking
Features.text: Book online or contact by email with your tattoo idea to plan your session.

Features.title: Walk-In Guidance
Features.text: For drop-in availability, message the studio first and confirm the best time to come.
